content:
Coordinate worker delegation for this round.
Target agents: POOL-0..POOL-4.
Available shapes: 23 shapes available (23 unprocessed).
Batch target: 5 shapes.

OPTIMIZED SHAPE DISTRIBUTION (batch-size=1, 5 workers, 5 total shapes):
POOL-0: shapes [0..1) - InstallationShape (class: Installation)
POOL-1: shapes [1..2) - EmissionPointShape (class: EmissionPoint)
POOL-2: shapes [2..3) - WithdrawalPointShape (class: WithdrawalPoint)
POOL-3: shapes [3..4) - MeasurementPointShape (class: MeasurementPoint)
POOL-4: shapes [4..5) - ProcessShape (class: Process)

Delegate immediately using these assignments.
NOTE: a shape's name is the validation rule's name, not necessarily a class name - never assume it is one. Tell each worker to type instances with the class shown in parentheses after each shape above, not with the shape's own name.

First pass: delegate the next batch and keep instructions concise.

Use SHACL context as source of truth for constraints.

Delegate immediately:
- Call `delegate_tasks` for each worker that should run this round.
- Keep each assignment short and concrete.
- Include target shape(s), target class, and whether to CREATE new instances or FIX existing ones.
- Include unresolved focus node/property details when available from Validation Report.
- Require worker tool call: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).

Rules:
- Do not produce long analysis text; prioritize immediate tool calls.
- Skip workers with no actionable assignment.
- Always instruct workers to create instances when assigned target class has no instances.
- Keep workers scoped to assigned shapes/classes only.

delegate_tasks({"instructions":"Target Shape: InstallationShape. Target Class: Installation. Goal: CREATE instances if no instances exist, or FIX existing ones to comply with InstallationShape constraints. Use the SHACL context as the source of truth. Report progress using worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","target_agent":"POOL-0"})

delegate_tasks({"instructions":"Target Shape: EmissionPointShape. Target Class: EmissionPoint. Goal: CREATE instances if no instances exist, or FIX existing ones to comply with EmissionPointShape constraints. Use the SHACL context as the source of truth. Report progress using worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","target_agent":"POOL-1"})

Report progress using worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","target_agent":"POOL-2"})

delegate_tasks({"instructions":"Target Shape: MeasurementPointShape. Target Class: MeasurementPoint. Goal: CREATE instances if no instances exist, or FIX existing ones to comply with MeasurementPointShape constraints. Use the SHACL context as the source of truth. Report progress using worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","target_agent":"POOL-3"})

delegate_tasks({"instructions":"Target Shape: ProcessShape. Target Class: Process. Goal: CREATE instances if no instances exist, or FIX existing ones to comply with ProcessShape constraints. Use the SHACL context as the source of truth. Report progress using worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","target_agent":"POOL-4"})

I have delegated the first batch of 5 shapes to workers POOL-0 through POOL-4, assigning each one shape. I await the `worker_progress` payloads to proceed with verification and the next round of delegation.
